author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

Use the global `std::atomic` pointers for all allocations to prevent the compiler from optimizing the allocations away. This technique was already used in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/49992.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/1956

#### PR validation:

The test succeeds in GCC 15 build.
title: [GCC15] Fix IntrusiveAllocMonitor test
